items.title: Maxi Kleber is contemplating his next move, and it might not be in the NBA.
items.author: LakersNation.com
items.body_excerpt:
Maxi Kleber is contemplating his next move, and it might not be in the NBA.
lakersnation.com/lakers-rumor...

media.title: Lakers Rumors: Maxi Kleber Likely To Return To Europe
media.description: Los Angeles Lakers reserve big man Maxi Kleber is exploring his EuroLeague market and is likely to return overseas to continue his career.
